fetchUserByEmailId: select id, name, email, password from Users where email = ? ;
fetchUserById: select id, name,email from Users where id = ? ;
createEvent: insert into Events (title, description, event_date, event_time, total_capacity, remaining_tickets, created_by, created_at) values (?,?,STR_TO_DATE(?, '%d-%m-%Y'),?,?,?,?,now());
fetchEvent: select id,title,description,DATE_FORMAT(event_date, '%d-%m-%Y') as event_date,event_time,total_capacity,remaining_tickets, created_by from Events where id = ?;
updateTicketCount: update Events set remaining_tickets = ? where id=?;
myBookedTickets: select e.title as title, DATE_FORMAT(e.event_date, '%d-%m-%Y') as event_date, e.event_time as event_time, b.ticket_id as ticket_id, b.no_of_tickets as number_of_tickets from Events e inner join Bookings b on e.id = b.event_id where b.user_id = ?
fetchTicketByTicketId: select e.title as title, e.id as event_id ,DATE_FORMAT(e.event_date, '%d-%m-%Y') as event_date, e.event_time as event_time, b.ticket_id as ticket_id, b.no_of_tickets as number_of_tickets from Events e inner join Bookings b on e.id = b.event_id where b.ticket_id = ?
getUpcomingEvents: SELECT id,title,description,DATE_FORMAT(event_date, '%d-%m-%Y') as event_date,event_time,total_capacity,remaining_tickets FROM Events WHERE TIMESTAMP(event_date, event_time) >= NOW();
